CommunityApplications.Profile:
racearr is the fast lane for your *arr downloads. When a Radarr/Sonarr grab is slow to start or crawling, racearr forces extra interactive searches, races several well-seeded alternates for the same movie/episode in parallel, keeps the fastest, and cancels the losers — so your library fills at the speed of your best available source. It is **not** a strike-and-remove cleaner; it adds speed by racing.
Works with Radarr and Sonarr + qBittorrent (Deluge/Transmission in beta). Starts in **DRY_RUN** (observe-only) so you can watch it decide before arming it. Ships a live dashboard, Prometheus metrics, and optional Discord/ntfy/Telegram/Gotify/Pushover/Apprise notifications.
Support and docs: https://github.com/dragoshont/racearr — issues at https://github.com/dragoshont/racearr/issues
